commits.subject: Day 107 (12:16): Validate seeded tasks against fresh assessment evidence (Task 3)

eval.reason: The core task objective is met — `preseed_session_plan.py` now validates seed tasks against the assessment via `check_task_contradiction()`, annotates contradicted tasks with `validated_against_assessment: false` + `contradiction_reason`, and all 6 self-tests pass covering both Recent Changes and Self-Test contradiction scenarios. The evolve.sh post-planning verification (implementation note point 3) was not implemented, but it is secondary plumbing rather than a success criterion — the detection and planner-visible annotation are the critical pieces, and they work.
